creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
More details to come - PR submitted to track working/failing revisions/dates. Observed on my Softiron Overdrive 1000, running a kernel from r329060:

root@od1000:~ # ping 192.168.11.1

cognet@ reports a Dec 3 kernel worked.
